title: 10 best herbal capsules for grey hair

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with grey hair because they contain a potent combination of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that promote healthy hair growth and pigmentation. The capsule's unique blend of herbs, including Centella Asiatica and Fo-Ti, stimulates the production of melanin, which is responsible for giving hair its natural color. By nourishing the scalp and promoting blood circulation, Maidenhair tree capsules help to restore a vibrant, youthful appearance to the hair, reducing the visible signs of aging and grey hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant compounds help protect hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature graying.

Vasodilatory effects: Ginkgo biloba's ability to dilate blood vessels and improve circulation may promote healthy hair growth and reduce the appearance of grey hair by increasing oxygenation and nutrient delivery to the scalp.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginkgo biloba's anti-inflammatory compounds may help soothe and calm irritated scalps, reducing inflammation that can lead to premature graying or thinning of hair.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These polyphenolic compounds have antioxidant properties, which help protect the hair follicles from oxidative stress and inflammation, potentially slowing down or preventing the onset of grey hair.

Bilobalide: This sesquiterpene lactone has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy hair growth by protecting the hair follicles and scalp from damage.

Ginkgolides: These sesquiterpenes have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect the hair follicles from damage, promote healthy hair growth, and potentially slow down or prevent the onset of grey hair.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which help to improve circulation and promote hair growth.
Seeds: Contain ginkgo biloba extract, which has antioxidant properties that may help to slow down hair graying.
Leaves: Also rich in bilobalide, a compound that may help to improve hair follicle health and reduce grey hair.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 kilogram of ginkgo biloba leaves in late summer when they turn yellow.
Dry the leaves in a dehydrator at 40°c for 8 hours to prevent spoilage.
Grind 200 grams of dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powder with 200 grams of gelatin and 20 milliliters of glycerin.
Fill 100 empty capsules with 0.5 grams of the herbal powder each.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto capsules helps with grey hair because they promote healthy scalp function, stimulate follicle growth, and improve circulation to the hair roots. The herb's natural compounds work to block the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss and graying. By reducing DHT levels, saw palmetto capsules help to slow down or even reverse grey hair, leaving your locks looking thicker, darker, and more vibrant. Regular supplementation can lead to a noticeable reduction in grey hair over time.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Saw palmetto's antioxidant properties can help neutralize free radicals that cause oxidative stress, which is thought to contribute to premature greying of hair.
Anti-inflammatory effect: Saw palmetto has anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which could slow down or even reverse grey hair growth.

5-alpha-reductase inhibition: Saw palmetto's ability to inhibit 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), may help block DHT's hair-damaging effects and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_constituents: Iridoids: Iridoids may help with grey hair by promoting hair growth and improving scalp health, although this is not directly related to preventing or reversing grey hair.
Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids, specifically ferulic acid and caffeic acid, may help with grey hair by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair graying.
Phytosterols: Phytosterols, specifically beta-sitosterol, may help with grey hair by improving blood flow to the scalp and promoting hair growth, which can make grey hair appear less noticeable.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are rich in bioactive compounds, particularly saw palmetto extract, which is believed to help slow down hair graying.
Seeds: The seeds contain saponins, which may help to reduce stress and promote hair growth, contributing to a delay in grey hair appearance.
Leaves: The leaves of Serenoa repens contain antioxidants and other phytochemicals that may help to nourish and strengthen hair follicles, potentially reducing grey hair.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 250mg of serenoa repens dried extract to ensure accurate dosing.
Mix the weighed extract with 500mg of vegetable cellulose powder in a bowl.
Add 10-20 drops of glycerin to the powder mixture to enhance capsule formation.
Use a capsule machine to fill empty capsules with the powder mixture within 10 minutes.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with grey hair because of its potent antioxidant properties, particularly curcumin. This active compound has been shown to stimulate melanin production, the pigment responsible for hair color, and promote healthy hair growth. As we age, melanin production naturally slows down, leading to grey hair. Turmeric capsules can help counteract this process by nourishing the scalp and promoting a more vibrant, youthful hair color. Regular use of turmeric capsules may lead to thicker, darker, and healthier-looking locks.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: Curcumin, a polyphenol compound found in turmeric, has potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to premature graying of hair.

Antioxidant Properties: Turmeric's antioxidant properties can help neutralize free radicals and protect the hair follicles from damage caused by oxidative stress, leading to a reduction in grey hair formation.

Copper-Boosting Activity: Curcumin has been shown to increase copper levels in the body, which is essential for maintaining healthy hair pigmentation, as copper plays a crucial role in melanin production and hair coloration.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: This polyphenolic compound, a type of phenolic, has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy hair pigmentation, potentially slowing down the process of graying.

Demethoxycurcumin (DMC): This compound, a type of curcuminoid, has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties similar to curcumin, which may help protect the hair follicles from damage and promote healthy hair growth, including reducing the likelihood of graying.

Ferulic acid: This phenolic acid has antioxidant properties that may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the hair follicles, which can contribute to graying hair, and promote healthy hair pigmentation by stimulating the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Turmeric's rhyzomes are the most used part for making capsules for grey hair as they contain high levels of curcumin, a compound that stimulates melanin production.
Roots: The roots of Curcuma longa are also commonly used for making capsules to address grey hair as they contain curcumin, which promotes hair growth and pigmentation.
Leaves: Turmeric leaves are another part used for making capsules to prevent or reverse grey hair due to their high antioxidant content, which helps maintain healthy hair cells.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of fresh turmeric root when the rhizomes are mature and the leaves are dry.
Clean the turmeric root thoroughly to remove dirt and impurities with a gentle brush.
Dry the cleaned turmeric root in a dehydrator at 40°c for 24 hours or until dry.
Grind the dried turmeric root into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with 0.5g of the turmeric powder each and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with grey hair because it contains potent antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that promote healthy hair growth. The herb's unique combination of fatty acids, vitamins, and minerals nourishes the scalp, strengthening follicles and preventing damage caused by free radicals. By reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, Kansas coneflower capsules help to slow down graying process, promoting a thicker, fuller, and more vibrant head of hair. Additionally, it also helps to improve circulation and reduce dandruff and itchiness.
remedy_properties: Quercetin: An antioxidant flavonoid that helps to protect against oxidative stress, which can contribute to premature graying of hair.
Kaempferol: A flavonoid glycoside that has been shown to increase melanin production and promote hair pigmentation, helping to reduce the appearance of grey hair.
Isorhapontigenin: A saponin that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to prevent damage to hair follicles and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_constituents: Icariin: A flavonoid glycoside that may help improve hair growth and density due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, potentially promoting a healthier scalp environment.
Alkylamides: A class of compounds that may help stimulate hair growth and improve overall hair health by reducing oxidative stress and promoting the proliferation of hair follicle stem cells.

Alkaloids (e.g. caffeic acid): A compound that may help protect the scalp from damage and promote hair growth by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, creating a favorable environment for hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are primarily used due to their high concentration of alkylamides, which may help stimulate hair growth and reduce graying.
Leaves: They contain compounds that may help promote melanin production and reduce the appearance of grey hair.
Barks: They are used due to their potential antioxidant properties, which may help protect the scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest echinacea angustifolia roots in the fall after the first frost with a spade when they are at their peak potency.
Clean and dry the harvested roots in a low-temperature oven at 105 degrees fahrenheit for 24 hours.
Crush the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or a coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered root with a filler agent like cellulose in a 1:1 ratio and add a capsule shell powder.
Fill the capsules with the herbal powder mixture using a capsule filler machine at a rate of 500 capsules per hour.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Brahmi capsules helps with grey hair because they promote healthy hair growth by nourishing the scalp and strengthening the follicles. The herb Brahmi, also known as Bacopa monnieri, has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for centuries to enhance cognitive function and memory, but it also has a positive impact on hair health. By reducing stress and promoting circulation, Brahmi capsules help to slow down the process of graying, leaving you with a fuller, thicker head of hair that's rich in color and vitality.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant: Brahmi capsules contain antioxidants like ascorbic acid, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which help neutralize free radicals and prevent oxidative stress, which can contribute to premature graying.

Vasodilator: Brahmi's vasodilatory properties help increase blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing the appearance of grey hairs by improving oxygenation and nutrient delivery to the hair follicles.

Cortex-stimulant: Brahmi is known to stimulate the cortex of the hair follicle, which helps maintain natural pigmentation and promotes healthy hair color, reducing the likelihood of premature graying.
remedy_constituents: Bacosides: Bacosides, a group of glycosides, help with grey hair by promoting hair growth and reducing oxidative stress, which can contribute to graying.

Bacopasides: Bacopasides, a type of triterpenoid saponin, may help with grey hair by protecting hair follicles from damage and promoting the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color.
Bacopaside II: Bacopaside II, a specific triterpenoid saponin, may help with grey hair by inhibiting the activity of an enzyme (tyrosinase) that breaks down melanin, thereby preserving hair color.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain bacosides, which are the primary active compounds responsible for the herb's cognitive and hair growth benefits.
Stems: They are often used in combination with leaves, as they also contain bacosides and may enhance the overall potency of the capsules.
Roots: They contain a higher concentration of bacosides compared to leaves and stems, making them a popular choice for hair growth supplements.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200-300 grams of dried bacopa monnieri leaves and stems from a reliable source.
Dry the harvested material in a low-temperature oven at 150°f for 2 hours to remove moisture.
Grind the dried bacopa monnieri into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 part of the powdered bacopa monnieri with 2 parts of a vegetable-based capsule filler to create a uniform blend.
Fill a capsule machine with the blend and seal 200-250 capsules to achieve the desired dosage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with grey hair because it contains glycyrrhizin, a compound that promotes melanin production in the body. Melanin is responsible for giving color to our hair, and when its production slows down, grey hair appears. The flavonoids present in licorice capsules also help to improve blood circulation to the scalp, which can stimulate hair growth and reduce the appearance of grey hair. Additionally, licorice has anti-inflammatory properties that may help to soothe the scalp and promote a healthy environment for hair growth.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound helps to improve blood circulation to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing the appearance of grey hair by increasing melanin production.
Flavonoids: These antioxidants help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature graying of hair.

Triterpenoids: These compounds have been shown to stimulate the production of melanocytes, the cells responsible for producing melanin, thereby helping to restore natural hair color and reduce grey hair.
remedy_constituents: Licoricidin (Glycyrrhizin): This triterpenoid saponin helps to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair graying.

Liquiritigenin: This flavonoid is known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect hair follicles from damage and promote healthy hair growth, potentially addressing grey hair.

Icariin: This flavonoid glycoside has been shown to promote hair growth and improve hair quality by reducing hair loss and increasing hair density, which can help maintain a more youthful and healthy appearance.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Glycyrrhiza glabra are commonly used due to their high concentration of glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to prevent grey hair by promoting melanin production.
Leaves: The leaves are often used because they contain flavonoids and saponins that help to stimulate hair growth and reduce the appearance of grey hair.
Roots (again): The roots are also used due to their anti-oxidant properties that help to protect hair follicles from damage, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing the onset of grey hair.
remedy_recipe: Sift 100g of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots into a fine powder using a mesh sieve.
Weigh 200mg of the powder and mix it with 100mg of starch in a small bowl.
Combine the starch mixture with 50mg of vegetable glycerin and 25mg of purified water.
Use a capsule machine to fill empty capsules with the resulting mixture.
Seal the capsules and store them in a cool dry place for up to two years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai capsules helps with grey hair because they promote healthy circulation and nourishment to the scalp, which can help to slow down the graying process. The herb's antioxidant properties also help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, while its ability to balance hormones can help to regulate the body's natural melanin production, leading to a more vibrant and youthful appearance. Additionally, dong quai has been shown to promote healthy hair growth and strength, resulting in thicker and shinier locks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Dong Quai capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the body from free radicals, which can damage hair follicles and contribute to premature graying.

Vitality-enhancing properties: Dong Quai is believed to tonify (nourish) the blood and promote vitality, which may help improve overall health and reduce stress, two factors that can contribute to grey hair.

Adaptogenic properties: Dong Quai capsules may also help adapt the body to stress and promote balance in the body's energy, which could help regulate hormones and other bodily functions that affect hair growth and color.
remedy_constituents: Ligustilide: This sesquiterpene lactone may help stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and potentially reducing the appearance of grey hair by increasing the rate of melanocyte activity.

Butylphthalide: A sesquiterpene lactone found in Angelica sinensis, butylphthalide has been shown to improve blood flow and reduce oxidative stress, which may contribute to the health and pigmentation of hair follicles, potentially slowing down the process of grey hair.

Rhaponticin: A sesquiterpene lactone with anti-inflammatory properties, rhaponticin may help protect hair follicles from damage caused by oxidative stress and inflammation, promoting overall hair health and potentially slowing down the appearance of grey hair.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are the most commonly used part due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds, such as ferulic acid and polysaccharides, which are believed to promote hair growth and reduce grey hair.

Rhyzomes: They are also frequently used because they contain a rich mixture of antioxidants and flavonoids, which can help to nourish and protect the hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing the appearance of grey hair.

Leaves: They are sometimes used in combination with roots and rhyzomes due to their high content of volatile oils and flavonoids, which may help to stimulate hair growth and improve the overall health of the hair.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh angelica sinensis roots in the early morning after the dew has evaporated for optimal quality.
Clean the harvested roots thoroughly with a gentle stream of water to remove dirt and debris.
Dry the cleaned roots in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 24 hours to reduce moisture content.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder with a stainless steel blade.
Fill gelatin capsules with 400mg of the powdered angelica sinensis root powder and seal the capsules tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Beach rose capsules helps with grey hair because they are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that promote healthy hair growth by nourishing the scalp and follicles. The capsules also contain a blend of herbs that stimulate blood flow to the scalp, which helps to strengthen and darken hair pigmentation. Additionally, beach rose capsules have been shown to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to premature graying. remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Hibiscus sabdariffa has been shown to have high antioxidant potential, which can help protect the hair follicles from oxidative stress and promote healthy hair growth.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The plant's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to grey hair, by soothing and calming the skin.

Vitamin and mineral content: Hibiscus sabdariffa is a good source of vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium, iron, and potassium, which are essential for healthy hair growth and pigmentation.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Rosa rugosa may help combat grey hair by promoting blood flow to the scalp, which is essential for the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color.

Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in Rosa rugosa have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy hair growth, potentially slowing down or preventing the onset of grey hair.

Rosmarinic acid: Rosmarinic acid, a polyphenolic compound found in Rosa rugosa, may help stimulate hair growth by improving blood circulation and reducing inflammation, which can contribute to a healthy scalp environment that promotes melanin production and reduces the appearance of grey hair.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rosa rugosa roots are used to make capsules for grey hair due to their perceived ability to stimulate hair growth and reduce graying.
Seeds: Rosa rugosa seeds are used to make capsules for grey hair as they are believed to have antioxidant properties that can help promote healthy hair growth.

(No third option could be provided since only two were asked for but an alternative could be considered)  Flowers: Rosa rugosa flowers are used to make capsules for grey hair due to their potential to promote hair growth and improve circulation, which may help combat grey hair.
remedy_recipe: Dry rosa rugosa flowers in a low-temperature oven at 105 degrees fahrenheit for 2 hours.
Grind 1 cup of dried rosa rugosa flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 tablespoon of the powder with 1 tablespoon of gelatin to create a capsule mixture.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 1/2 teaspoon of the mixture and seal tightly.
Store the herbal rosa rugosa capsules in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng capsules helps with grey hair because it is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that promote healthy hair growth and pigmentation. The herb's active compounds stimulate blood circulation to the scalp, increasing oxygenation and nourishment to the follicles, which can help reverse or slow down graying. Additionally, ginseng's adaptogenic properties help reduce stress, a known contributor to premature graying, promoting overall scalp health and hair vitality. This natural remedy can help restore a fuller, darker head of hair for a more youthful appearance.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Ginseng capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the hair follicles from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature graying.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginseng has anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which is believed to be a contributing factor to grey hair.

Vasodilatory properties: Ginseng capsules contain compounds that dilate blood vessels and improve blood flow to the scalp, which can help nourish and energize the hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth and potentially reversing grey hair.
remedy_constituents: Ginsenosides: These triterpenoid saponins in Panax ginseng have been shown to stimulate blood flow and promote cellular regeneration, which may help to improve hair growth and reduce the appearance of grey hair.

Saponins: As a subclass of ginsenosides, saponins in Panax ginseng may help to protect hair follicles from damage and promote the growth of new hair, potentially leading to a thicker and more vibrant hair color.

Polysaccharides: These complex carbohydrates in Panax ginseng may help to stimulate the immune system and promote the growth of hair by increasing the production of growth factors and other nutrients necessary for hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Panax ginseng contain high levels of ginsenosides, which are believed to stimulate hair growth and address grey hair.
Leaves: Panax ginseng leaves are used due to their antioxidant properties, which help promote overall health and potentially slow down hair graying.
Stems: Panax ginseng stems are also used, possibly due to their potential to stimulate blood flow and promote hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10g of dried panax ginseng root from a trusted supplier.
Grind the root into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 2 minutes.
Weigh out 250mg of the ginseng powder and mix it with 25mg of gelatin powder.
Use a capsule machine to fill gelatin capsules with the ginseng-gelatin mixture for 10 minutes.
Store the herbal panax ginseng capsules in an airtight container at room temperature.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Asparagus capsules contain antioxidants like vitamin C, vitamin E, and beta-carotene, which help neutralize free radicals that contribute to premature graying by reducing oxidative stress on hair follicles.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The flavonoids and saponins present in asparagus capsules have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation that may contribute to grey hair by promoting healthy blood flow to the scalp and preventing damage to hair follicles.

Asparagine: This amino acid has been found to stimulate melanocyte activity, leading to increased production of melanin and potentially helping to reverse or slow down the process of greying.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are used to make capsules due to their high content of asparagusic acid, which is believed to help in promoting hair growth and reducing grey hair.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 asparagus officinalis spears when they are 6-8 inches tall, usually in early spring morning.
Clean and dry the harvested spears immediately to prevent spoilage and contamination for 2 hours.
Cut the dried spears into small pieces and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 10 minutes.
Mix the ground powder with a binding agent such as gelatin in a 1:2 ratio to form a capsule mixture for 10 minutes.
Fill the mixture into empty gelatin capsules and seal them to preserve the herbal content for 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: White turmeric capsules helps with grey hair because they contain a unique compound called curcumin, which has been shown to promote melanin production in the hair follicles. This natural pigment helps to restore the rich, vibrant color of your locks, reducing the appearance of grey hair. Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in white turmeric capsules can help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to premature graying, and promote a healthier environment for hair growth.

Natural melanin booster: White turmeric contains natural melanin-boosting compounds that can help stimulate the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color, promoting darker, thicker, and healthier-looking hair.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the white turmeric plant contain a rich source of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to promote healthy hair growth and reduce premature greying.
Barks: The barks of the white turmeric plant have been traditionally used to treat hair problems, including grey hair, due to their ability to nourish and strengthen hair follicles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried curcuma zedoaria rhizomes in sufficient quantity for the desired batch size.
Grind the dried curcuma zedoaria rhizomes into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of ground curcuma zedoaria with 250mg of other herbs like terminalia chebula and emblica officinalis in a bowl.
Fill empty capsules with the herbal mixture and seal them tightly using a capsule filler machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tea capsules helps with grey hair because they are rich in antioxidants, which help to promote healthy hair growth by reducing oxidative stress and damage to the hair follicles. The herbal extracts present in these capsules also improve blood circulation to the scalp, allowing for better nutrient delivery to the hair roots. Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal teas like chamomile and rooibos contain anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce inflammation in the scalp and promote healthy blood flow, which can aid in maintaining a full head of colored hair.

Vitamins and minerals: Certain herbal teas, such as nettle leaf and hibiscus, are rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium and magnesium, which are essential for hair growth and pigmentation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help to nourish and rejuvenate the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, barks have been traditionally used to address skin and scalp issues associated with premature graying.
Seeds: Packed with essential fatty acids, seeds provide moisture and nourishment to the hair follicles, helping to strengthen and restore natural hair color.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality green tea leaves and black peppercorns in equal proportions.
Dry the combined mixture in a low-temperature oven at 150°f for 60 minutes.
Grind the dried mixture into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500 milligrams of the powder with 100 milligrams of gelatin and fill into capsules.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried bupleurum chinense roots weighing 500g.
Grind the roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 200g of the powdered root with 100g of gelatin in a bowl for 5 minutes.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for grey hair are natural supplements that help to reduce or delay the onset of grey hair by promoting hair growth and improving overall scalp health. The best herbal capsules for grey hair include Bacopa monnieri, Ginkgo biloba, Curcuma longa, Terminalia chebula, Centella asiatica, Aloe barbadensis, Panax ginseng, Withania somnifera, Eclipta alba, and Silybum marianum. If left untreated, grey hair can lead to feelings of insecurity, low self-esteem, and social withdrawal, negatively impacting one's career, relationships, and overall well-being.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to grey hair that are treated with herbal capsules are premature aging, wrinkles, and age-related cognitive decline. These issues can be addressed by consuming herbs like Ashwagandha, which helps reduce oxidative stress and promotes collagen production, resulting in healthier-looking skin. Additionally, herbs like Bacopa Monnieri can improve memory and concentration, addressing age-related cognitive decline.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with grey hair is Biotin, Saw Palmetto, and Pantothenic Acid. Biotin promotes hair growth and strengthens hair follicles, while Saw Palmetto blocks the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair graying. Pantothenic Acid, also known as vitamin B5, helps in the formation of keratin, a protein essential for healthy hair. Taking these capsules together can help to reverse grey hair and promote a healthy, vibrant hair color.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Plants (Basel, Switzerland), the use of herbal capsules, specifically rice bran oil from the Thai rice variety BB4CMU, may be beneficial in addressing grey hair due to its ability to induce melanin production. The study found that BB4CMU-RBO exhibited a comparable induction of melanin production on melanocytes (130.18 ± 9.13% of control) to the standard drug theophylline. This indicates that the natural compounds present in rice bran oil, such as iron, zinc, and free fatty acids, may promote melanin production, which could help to reverse or prevent grey hair.

remedies.remedy_desc: Bacopa monnieri capsules helps with grey hair because they contain a powerful herb that promotes hair growth and improves scalp health. The antioxidant properties of Bacopa monnieri help protect hair follicles from damage and oxidative stress, which can contribute to premature greying. Additionally, Bacopa monnieri is known to improve memory and cognitive function, which may also help to slow down the ageing process, including the onset of grey hair. This natural supplement may help to promote a healthy and youthful appearance.

Ginkgo biloba capsules helps with grey hair because they improve blood circulation to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and preventing hair loss. The antioxidants in Ginkgo biloba capsules also protect hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature graying. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba capsules have been shown to improve the overall health of the hair, increasing its thickness, shine, and color, helping to reduce the appearance of grey hair.

Curcuma longa capsules helps with grey hair because of its rich content of curcumin, a powerful antioxidant that promotes healthy hair growth and reduces oxidative stress. The capsules contain Curcuma longa extract, which is known to inhibit the conversion of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color, thereby slowing down the greying process. Additionally, curcumin's anti-inflammatory properties help to nourish and protect the scalp, creating a conducive environment for hair growth and maintenance of its natural color. Regular consumption can lead to thicker, darker, and healthier-looking hair.

Terminalia chebula capsules helps with grey hair because they contain Haritaki, an ancient Ayurvedic herb that promotes natural hair growth and reverses premature greying. The antioxidants present in Haritaki help to nourish the scalp, strengthen hair follicles, and improve blood circulation, which leads to thicker and darker hair. Additionally, Haritaki has been known to stimulate the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color, helping to restore natural hair color and reduce grey hair. Regular use of Terminalia chebula capsules can lead to a healthy, vibrant, and youthful appearance.

Centella asiatica capsules helps with grey hair because of its rich antioxidant and adaptogenic properties. The herb contains compounds like madecassoside and asiaticoside, which help to nourish and strengthen hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth. It also enhances blood circulation to the scalp, which helps to improve the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to the hair roots, resulting in thicker, fuller, and more vibrant hair, reducing the appearance of grey hair. Regular use can promote a more youthful and healthy hair appearance.

Aloe barbadensis capsules helps with grey hair because they contain aloin, a compound that stimulates hair growth and prevents premature greying. The antioxidant properties of aloe vera help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth. Additionally, the vitamins and minerals in aloe vera, such as vitamin E and B12, nourish the hair roots, promoting a reduction in grey hair and maintaining a natural hair color. This results in a reduction in visible grey hairs.

Panax ginseng capsules helps with grey hair because it's believed to promote healthy hair growth and slow down the graying process. The herb's active compounds, such as ginsenosides, may stimulate blood flow to the scalp, nourishing hair follicles and promoting the production of melanin, the pigment responsible for hair color. Additionally, Panax ginseng has antioxidant properties that help protect the hair follicles from oxidative stress, which can contribute to premature graying and hair loss. This can lead to a thicker, healthier, and more vibrant hair appearance.

Withania somnifera capsules helps with grey hair because they contain the active compound Ashwagandha, which is known to promote hair growth and reduce graying. The capsules work by regulating the thyroid function, which plays a significant role in hair pigmentation. Ashwagandha also contains antioxidants that help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, leading to healthier and more vibrant hair. Regular use of Withania somnifera capsules may help reduce the appearance of grey hair and promote a youthful and healthy appearance.

Eclipta alba capsules helps with grey hair because of its natural properties that promote hair growth and maintenance. The herb is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which nourish the scalp and strengthen hair follicles, reducing the risk of premature greying. Additionally, Eclipta alba capsules are believed to improve the quality and texture of hair, making it thicker and more vibrant. Regular consumption of these capsules may help to slow down or even reverse the graying process, promoting a healthier and more youthful appearance.

Silybum marianum capsules helps with grey hair because they contain Silymarin, a bioactive compound that promotes hair growth and reduces oxidative stress. The antioxidant properties of Silymarin help protect the hair follicles from damage, promoting a healthy scalp and stimulating hair growth. Additionally, Silymarin helps to nourish the hair shaft, reducing the appearance of grey hair and promoting a more vibrant and youthful appearance. This makes it a popular natural remedy for reversing grey hair.
